hero.title: Universal Nuxt Template
hero.subtitle: i18n, SEO, icons, fonts, state management — all configured out of the box

i18n.title: Internationalization (i18n)
i18n.desc: Chinese & English support, browser language detection, URL prefix strategy

seo.title: SEO Suite
seo.desc: Auto-generated sitemap, robots.txt, OG images, Schema.org structured data

tailwind.title: Tailwind CSS
tailwind.desc: Atomic CSS, dark mode support, custom theme configured

pinia.title: Pinia State
pinia.desc: Type-safe global state with SSR and persistence support

icons.title: Lucide Icons
icons.desc: Lightweight modern icon set, server-side rendering optimized

fonts.title: Font Optimization
fonts.desc: Auto-optimized Google Fonts with Chinese font support (Noto Sans SC)

csrf.title: CSRF Protection
csrf.desc: Auto-injected CSRF tokens protecting forms and API requests

animate.title: Auto Animate
animate.desc: FormKit Auto Animate for smooth list and conditional render transitions

about.title: About This Template
about.desc: A production-ready Nuxt 4 starter template with all common features pre-configured.
